title: Dual-Choice Chamber Assay

","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7s6du","text":"The protocol describes a laboratory assay to test the repellency of an
essential oil using a modified dual-choice chamber assay system. The assay
assesses the movement of the mosquito away from or towards the essential oil.
The modified system detects repellency. Mosquito responses to repellent","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6k9p0","text":" compounds can be evaluated in a laboratory dual-choice chamber system.
